language.name: Language
language.desc: Plugin UI language. "Auto" follows Obsidian's interface language.

answerMode.name: Answer mode
answerMode.desc: Choose Quick Answer for speed, or Advisor Answer when you want KogCat to lead the response.

engine.name: Engine
engine.desc: Restart the local engine, check for updates, or open the log file.

advanced.name: Advanced engine settings
advanced.desc: Managed automatically by default. Open this only if you run om-core yourself or need a custom binary/port.

external.name: External engine
external.desc: Connect to an already-running om-core on port {{port}} instead of launching the managed engine.

binaryPath.name: Binary path
binaryPath.desc: Override the managed binary. Leave empty to use the auto-downloaded engine.

port.name: Port
port.desc: HTTP port for the local engine. KogCat falls back to a free port if this one is busy.

chatModel.name: Chat model
chatModel.desc: Choose the model you want to use for chat.

applyModel.name: Apply model
applyModel.desc: Choose the model you want to use for apply feature.

systemPrompt.name: System prompt
systemPrompt.desc: This prompt will be added to the beginning of every chat.

includeCurrentFile.name: Include current file
includeCurrentFile.desc: Automatically include the content of your current file in chats.

enableTools.name: Enable tools
enableTools.desc: Allow the AI to use MCP tools.

maxAutoIterations.name: Max auto tool requests
maxAutoIterations.desc: Maximum number of consecutive tool calls that can be made automatically without user confirmation. Higher values can significantly increase costs as each tool call consumes additional tokens.

embeddingModel.name: Embedding model
embeddingModel.desc: Choose the model you want to use for embeddings

includePatterns.name: Include patterns
includePatterns.desc: Specify glob patterns to include files in indexing (one per line). Example: use 'notes/**' for all files in the notes folder. Leave empty to include all files. Requires 'Rebuild entire vault index' after changes.

excludePatterns.name: Exclude patterns
excludePatterns.desc: Specify glob patterns to exclude files from indexing (one per line). Example: use 'notes/**' for all files in the notes folder. Leave empty to exclude nothing. Requires 'Rebuild entire vault index' after changes.

chunkSize.name: Chunk size
chunkSize.desc: Set the chunk size for text splitting. After changing this, please re-index the vault using the 'Rebuild entire vault index' command.

thresholdTokens.name: Threshold tokens
thresholdTokens.desc: Maximum number of tokens before switching to RAG. If the total tokens from mentioned files exceed this, RAG will be used instead of including all file contents.

minSimilarity.name: Minimum similarity
minSimilarity.desc: Minimum similarity score for RAG results. Higher values return more relevant but potentially fewer results.

limit.name: Limit
limit.desc: Maximum number of RAG results to include in the prompt. Higher values provide more context but increase token usage.

models.desc: Built-in models are shortcuts. Use Add custom model to enter manual model IDs from any configured provider.

chatModels.desc: Models available for chat and apply

embeddingModels.desc: Models used for generating embeddings for RAG

models.noSettings: No settings available for this model

reasoning.name: Reasoning
reasoning.desc: Enable reasoning for the model. Available for o-series models (e.g., o3, o4-mini) and GPT-5 models.

reasoningEffort.name: Reasoning Effort
reasoningEffort.desc: Controls how much thinking the model does before responding. Default is "medium".

reasoningEffort.name: Reasoning Effort
reasoningEffort.desc: Controls how much thinking the model does before responding.

extendedThinking.name: Extended Thinking
extendedThinking.desc: Enable extended thinking for Claude. Available for Claude Sonnet 3.7+ and Claude Opus 4.0+.

budgetTokens.name: Budget Tokens
budgetTokens.desc: The maximum number of tokens that Claude can use for thinking. Must be at least 1024.

thinkingSettings.name: Thinking Settings
thinkingSettings.desc: Customize thinking level or budget. When disabled, the model follows its default behavior (dynamic thinking for most Gemini 2.5 and 3 models).

controlMode.name: Control Mode
controlMode.desc: Use 'Level' for Gemini 3 models, 'Budget' for Gemini 2.5 models.

thinkingLevel.name: Thinking Level
thinkingLevel.desc: Controls reasoning depth. 'high' is default for Gemini 3.

thinkingBudget.name: Thinking Budget
thinkingBudget.desc: Token budget for thinking. Use -1 for dynamic, 0 to disable.

includeThoughts.name: Include Thought Summaries
includeThoughts.desc: Shows a summary of the model's reasoning process. Enabling this can increase token usage.

searchContextSize.name: Search Context Size
searchContextSize.desc: Determines how much search context is retrieved for the model. Choose "low" for minimal context and lower costs, "medium" for a balanced approach, or "high" for maximum context at higher cost. Default is "low".

mcp.warning: When using tools, the tool response is passed to the language model (LLM). If the tool result contains a large amount of content, this can significantly increase LLM usage and associated costs. Please be mindful when enabling or using tools that may return long outputs.
mcp.notSupported: MCP is not supported on mobile devices

packs.engineUnavailable: KogCat engine unavailable — start the engine to manage packs.
packs.noFiles: Place .ompack files in your vault to install them.

templates.howTo: How to use: Create templates with reusable content that you can quickly insert into your chat. Type /template-name in the chat input to trigger template insertion. You can also drag and select text in the chat input to reveal a "Create template" button for quick template creation.

planConnections.desc: Use a subscription instead of API-key billing. Connected subscriptions consume your plan's included usage (Codex for OpenAI, Gemini Code Assist for Gemini). Subscriptions aren't supported on mobile environments.

openai.title: OpenAI
openai.desc: Uses your Codex usage from your ChatGPT plan.

gemini.title: Gemini
gemini.descPrefix: Uses your Gemini Code Assist usage from your Google AI Plan.
gemini.descSuffix: Check your limit in Gemini CLI with

reset.name: Reset settings
reset.desc: Reset all settings to default values
